# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "2.1"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Response-Time
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: false
    enabled: true

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: apikey
      run_on_preflight: true
    enabled: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      limit_by: consumer
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
    enabled: true

services:
  - name: example-service
    url: http://backend.example.com
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Content-Type
          credentials: false
        enabled: true
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_header: true
          key_name: apikey
        enabled: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          limit_by: consumer
          policy: local
        enabled: true

routes:
  - name: example-route
    paths:
      - /api/v1/*
    service:
      name: example-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Response-Time
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: false
        enabled: true
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_header: true
          key_name: apikey
        enabled: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 250
          limit_by: consumer
          policy: local
        enabled: true

consumers:
  - username: example-consumer
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          limit_by: consumer
          policy: local
        enabled: true
